name: Play From Hand - Surging Bolt Imbue
description: Minimal main-phase setup that places Surging Bolt and three additional fire cards in hand so the draft can exercise the card's Imbue payment path against a champion target.

champion.description: Card ID to replace the champion on the field. Replaces whichever CHAMPION card is currently on myField. Omit to keep the default fixture champion.

element.description: Spirit element for the champion lineage: fire, water, or wind. Replaces the champion's spirit subcard. Omit to keep the default fixture spirit.

mastery.description: Card ID to add to player one's mastery zone. Omit to start with no mastery.
